stemHtml: The dew point is defined as the…

options.a: temperature at which moisture in the air will condense as a layer of frost on any exposed surface.
options.b: temperature at which the vapour present in a sample of air would cause saturation.
options.c: ratio of the vapour pressure of a sample of air to the saturation pressure at the existing temperature.
options.d: temperature at which the pressure exerted by the surroundings upon a liquid is equalled by the pressure exerted by the vapour of the liquid.
